nasb.text: So Jehoash slept with his fathers and was buried in Samaria with the kings of Israel; and Jeroboam his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Jehoash slept with his fathers and was buried in Samaria with the kings of Israel, and Jeroboam his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約阿施和他的祖先一同長眠，他和以色列諸王一樣，葬在撒瑪利亞。他的兒子耶羅波安接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约阿施与祖先同眠后，葬在撒玛利亚的以色列王陵。他儿子耶罗波安继位。
